properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 43/17
1.SEISMIC SURVEY FROM 15 MAY BY POLAR EMPRESS-LAER7
VESSEL IS TOWING SEISMIC CABLES IN AREA B0UND BY.
A. 72-30.0N 015-41.0E
B. 72-30.0N 018-55.0E
C. 71-16.0N 019-09.0E
D. 71-01.0N 017-54.0E
E. 71-01.0N 015-57.0E
F. 72-30.0N 015-41.0E

VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 6 NM
GUARD VESSEL SANCO SKY AND ANDREA IN ATTENDANCE
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 40/17
